published_comparison.comparison_status: No Mem0/Zep/MemGPT LongMemEval category numbers found in the paper; runner records NDPA hit@K only.
published_comparison.source: LongMemEval paper reports retrieval baselines such as BM25, Contriever, GTE, and Stella, but not Mem0/Zep/MemGPT in the released benchmark paper.
